highlights.description: CLI tool to convert TypeScript Zod schemas to Go structs via JSON Schema intermediate format
Full pipeline with `generate` command, or step-by-step with `zod2json` and `json2go` commands
Complete Insomnia v5 schema conversion example included

added.description: JSON Schema parser with support for objects, arrays, enums, refs, nullable types
Go code generator with json/yaml tags, pointers for optional fields, and enum constants
Zod to JSON Schema conversion via Node.js integration (tsx, ts-node, or node)
`generate` CLI command for full pipeline: Zod → JSON Schema → Go
`zod2json` CLI command to convert Zod schema to JSON Schema
`json2go` CLI command to convert JSON Schema to Go structs
`check` CLI command to verify Node.js dependencies
`--schema-out` flag for `generate` command to save intermediate JSON Schema
`TypeNameFromExport()` helper to derive Go type names from Zod export names
Binary path validation for secure exec.Command execution
Insomnia v5 schema conversion example with standalone Zod schema, JSON Schema, and Go types

fixed.description: Handle MarkFlagRequired errors in CLI commands per error handling protocol
Add binary path validation to address gosec G204 security warning

build.description: Makefile with build, test, install, and clean targets
Node.js helper scripts for zod-to-json-schema integration
Shared CI workflows for linting and testing

tests.description: Unit tests for JSON Schema parsing, Go generation, arrays, enums, nullable types

documentation.description: README with installation, usage examples, and CLI reference
Insomnia example README documenting conversion process and limitations
